message:
feat(core): add asupersync-runtime feature guard to async test helpers

When the asupersync-runtime feature is enabled, the custom CompatRuntime
does not automatically provide a tokio reactor context. This adds a
conditional tokio runtime creation block (gated behind
#[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]) to every run_async_test helper
across 47 modules in frankenterm-core.

The guard creates a current-thread tokio runtime and enters its context
before the CompatRuntime is built, ensuring that tokio-dependent
operations (timers, I/O, channels) work correctly under the asupersync
runtime backend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
